data.name: My Mafia Lord Romance
data.detailed_description:
My Mafia Lord Romance is a Boys’ Love visual novel that draws you into a world of danger, desire, and forbidden attraction.

You play as Bennet, a man who only wanted a quiet, ordinary life—until fate binds him to Quintin, the city’s most feared yet irresistibly magnetic Mafia Lord.

What begins as a fleeting encounter turns into a perilous dance of power, loyalty, and temptation. As Bennet is pulled deeper into Quintin’s criminal empire, his heart and morals are put to the test. Will he surrender to Quintin’s dangerous charm… or fight to reclaim the peace he once knew?

In this story, love can be as lethal as betrayal—and every choice could lead you closer to passion or ruin.

GAME FEATURES

  • Choice-Based Narrative – Every decision shapes Bennet’s fate and determines the outcome of his relationship with Quintin.

  • Yaoi / Boys’ Love Romance – A deeply emotional story filled with tension, intimacy, and undeniable chemistry.

  • Animated Intimate Scenes – Smooth, expressive animations that heighten the game’s most heartfelt and passionate moments.

  • Original Art & Characters – Hand-crafted visuals and designs created exclusively for My Mafia Lord Romance.

  • Immersive Atmosphere – A dramatic soundtrack and detailed environments that pull you into the seductive and dangerous world of the Mafia.

data.short_description: A boy’s love visual novel of danger and desire. Play as Bennet, an ordinary man drawn into the orbit of Quintin—the city’s most feared Mafia Lord. Caught between loyalty, power, and temptation, you must decide whether to resist his darkness… or surrender to it.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
